revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初八]][[zh:八月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 8|qq=August 8}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Eiso|ja|永祚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiso|1=Einin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11132532}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|989|en|989|qid=Q23702|lt=989|1=989}} {{ill|September 10|en|September 10|qid=Q2853|lt=September 10|1=September 10}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Eien|en|Eien|qid=Q1324864|lt=Eien|1=Eien}} to {{ill|Eiso|ja|永祚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiso|1=Einin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11132532}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}}) – In the year of Bokgo (戊午), a secret imperial edict was issued whereby the court decreed that the signing of the {{ill|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|en|Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)|qid=Q1194699|lt=US–Japan Treaty of Amity and Commerce|1=Treaty of Amity and Commerce (United States–Japan)}} by the bakufu was contrary to imperial command. == Births == * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|qid=Q1145723|lt=Kannen|1=Kan'en}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1750|en|1750|qid=Q7611|lt=1750|1=1750}} {{ill|September 8|en|September 8|qid=Q2850|lt=September 8|1=September 8}}) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke|en|Tanikaze Kajinosuke|qid=Q323465|lt=Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|1=Tanikaze Kajinosuke}}, a 4th-generation {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yokozuna|qid=Q1067277}} (died {{ill|1795|en|1795|qid=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|qid=Q2883|lt=September 28|1=September 28}}) – {{ill|Hachisuka Mochiaki|en|Hachisuka Mochiaki|qid=Q656008|lt=Hachisuga Mosho|1=Hachisuka Mochiaki}}, head of the {{ill|Tokushima Domain|en|Tokushima Domain|qid=Q3034557|lt=Tokushima Domain|1=Tokushima Domain}} (died {{ill|1918|en|1918|qid=Q2094|lt=1918|1=1918}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|qid=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}}) – {{ill|Utako Shimoda|en|Utako Shimoda|qid=Q7902558|lt=Shimoda Utako|1=Utako Shimoda}}, an educator and {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} (died {{ill|1936|en|1936|qid=Q18649|lt=1936|1=1936}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}}) – {{ill|Nitobe Inazō|en|Nitobe Inazō|qid=Q12696|lt=Nitobe Inazo|1=Nitobe Inazō}}, an agricultural scientist and educator (died {{ill|1933|en|1933|qid=Q18726|lt=1933|1=1933}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Ninken|en|Emperor Ninken|qid=Q357266|lt=Emperor Ninken|1=Emperor Ninken}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|498|en|498|qid=Q32092|lt=498|1=498}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ninken|en|Emperor Ninken|qid=Q357266|lt=Emperor Ninken|1=Emperor Ninken}}, the 24th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|449|en|449|qid=Q32330|lt=449|1=449}}). * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1685|en|1685|qid=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}} {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}}) – {{ill|Aoyama Tadao|en|Aoyama Tadao|qid=Q4778835|lt=Aoyama Tadao|1=Aoyama Tadao}}, 2nd-generation head of the {{ill|Hamamatsu Domain|en|Hamamatsu Domain|qid=Q3034440|lt=Hamamatsu Domain|1=Hamamatsu Domain}} (born {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsusada|en|Tokugawa Mitsusada|qid=Q1046230|lt=Tokugawa Mitsusada|1=Tokugawa Mitsusada}}, 2nd-generation head of the {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|qid=Q1069187|lt=Kishu Domain|1=Kishū Domain}} (born {{ill|1627|en|1627|qid=Q6833|lt=1627|1=1627}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1762|en|1762|qid=Q7652|lt=1762|1=1762}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}}) – {{ill|Yamawaki Tōyō|ja|山脇東洋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamawaki Tōyō|1=Yamawaki Tōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11470871}}, a medical scholar (born {{ill|1706|en|1706|qid=Q6835|lt=1706|1=1706}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|7|8|9|7|8|9|8|0808|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 8월 8일]] [[ja:8月8日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月初八]]
